The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template
summary: The Create design API now supports two new creation modes: copying an existing design using type: design, and creating a design from a brand template using type: brand_template. Both creation modes are currently a preview feature.

title: The Create design export job API now supports CSV export using the csv export file type. Only Canva Sheets designs can be exported as CSV.
New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or delet
summary: New preview APIs are available: Create design merge job and Get design merge job. These APIs let you merge design pages by inserting, moving, or deleting pages to create a new design or modify an existing one.

title: The Create design API now supports email in the name field for preset types.
A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't
summary: A new type request parameter has been added to the Create design API. Although this type is shown as required, for backward compatibility, if it isn't provided in a request, the request type will be assumed to be type_and_asset.

title: PKCE is now generally available!
summary: We are excited to announce support for Proof Key for Code Exchange (PKCE). PKCE is an OAuth security extension that enables developers to build more secure Slack applications on public clients, such as desktop apps and mobile apps, without the need to embed a vulnerable client_secret.

title: The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating e
summary: The Create design export job API now supports two additional email export formats: html_bundle and html_standalone. Use these formats when creating export jobs for email designs, depending on whether you need bundled assets (html_bundle) or a standalone HTML output (html_standalone).
